title: coryphopteris musashiensis
intro: Coryphopteris musashiensis, also known as Musashi's fern, is a species of fern native to Japan. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Coryphopteris musashiensis include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Coryphopteris musashiensis is often used in teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
